rag_rules: AGREE contracts for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings and signal routing should be defined in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections are declared
generic_rules: Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation contracts
Guarantee statements in implementation scopes should relate visible outputs to visible inputs, avoiding implementation-only subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Component type contracts should not reference subcomponent ports directly unless represented through valid variables or outputs
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
